name: Ed Asner's Deep Pot Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------DOUGH-----------------------------------
1. Combine flour, shortening, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Stir in butterscotch chips, cinnamon, water, brown sugar, and additional cinnamon until smooth.
3. Cook over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Roll dough on a floured board, cut into 1-inch strips.
6. Bake strips at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Combine the cooked apples with half of the sauce in a deep buttered baking dish.
Lay pastry strips over the apples and pour remaining sauce over top.
Continue layering until all is used, leaving pastry on top.
Serve each portion in individual bowls. Optionally serve with whipped cream.
